steps.title: Find the angle at C
steps.content:
The exterior angle and angle BCA form a straight line:
$$180^\circ-110^\circ=70^\circ$$

steps.title: Use the equal angles
steps.content: The question states that angles BAC and BCA have equal measures, so angle BAC also measures $70^\circ$.

steps.title: Use the triangle sum
steps.content:
The angles in triangle ABC sum to $180^\circ$:
$$70^\circ+70^\circ+x^\circ=180^\circ$$
$$x=40$$
The answer is D.
